street.description: Street on which the flashing warning light is located, as written in the source (suspected typos kept verbatim and flagged in notes)

direction.description: Direction of travel the light governs; empty when the source states none (most entries)

cross_street.description: Named public street/way locating the light: the 'at'/'and' street for intersection entries, or the reference way for offset entries; slash-joined dual designations kept as written; empty when the reference is a landmark

landmark.description: Non-street reference feature anchoring the location (park, greenway, driveway, parking area, town line), leading article 'the' dropped; empty when the reference is a named street

offset_feet.description: Distance in feet from the reference point, for 'N feet DIRECTION of REF' entries; empty for plain intersection entries

offset_direction.description: Compass bearing of the offset from the reference point; set iff offset_feet is set

signal_type.description: Type of flashing device from the trailing descriptor: rrfb (rectangular rapid flashing beacon), flashing_yellow, or flashing_red; empty when the source states none

pedestrian_activated.description: 'yes' when the source says the device is pedestrian activated; empty when activation is not stated

location_detail.description: Positional qualifier from the source not captured by the other columns (e.g. 'eastern leg', 'between the entrance and exit'); never carries the signal descriptor

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text (suspected typos, missing signal type); never carries data
